purpose: Reconcile the empalmed frontend baseline, source-safe TyA materialization plan, Firebase DEV clean-state evidence, clean payment/certification dry-run and post-empalme smoke into one executable GO/HOLD report without authorizing writes.

lanes.baseline: Continuity checkpoint plus verified source-safe materialization summary.
lanes.firebaseDevCleanState: Sanitized read-only provider report proving the target is new and empty.
lanes.sourceSafePaymentsAndCertifications: Existing dry-run importer report with stable-key payment matches and authenticated-review certification carryover.
lanes.postEmpalmeSmoke: Source-safe runtime smoke preserving period, visit and shopper counts.

decisions.HOLD_REQUIRED_INPUTS_OR_EVIDENCE: One or more lanes are missing, partial, blocked or inconsistent.
decisions.READY_FOR_HUMAN_AUTHORIZATION_REVIEW: All four lanes are ready. This is still not permission to write or materialize.

hardStops: non-empty or inconclusive Firebase DEV target
any report claiming writes, import or production

reusableCxorbia: missing evidence is HOLD, never inferred GO
human authorization review is separate from execution authorization
exclusiveClient: TyA/Cinepolis expected counts and source status live in source-safe configuration, not this reusable contract
claudePrototype: render each lane and blocker honestly; never label READY_FOR_HUMAN_AUTHORIZATION_REVIEW as imported, connected or live
academia: teach the difference between baseline ready, clean target, source dry-run, smoke and write authorization
sinImpactoClaude: hashing, filesystem checks, CI artifact paths and report serialization
